name: Bartending
description:
You've just scored a new job at a bar, however something seems slightly off...

Warning

Contains heavy non-con.

Things to note:

  • This is Your thoughts, This is the training. You don't have to obey the hypnosis but all my example dialogue will have {{user}} submitting. Plus do not use '*' and '**' in another context when responding as the bot may get confused.

  • Use a persona, it will greatly improve your experience.Use chat memory with how many 'training sessions' you've had and what it trained into you.

  • 'Shift Time' should decrease once for each customer you serve a drink to, the bot will sometimes fuck this up so you will have to sometimes do it manually.
creator: Penguin070
